messages.text: about that flow, unusual is you doing leg day like it’s a threat
you say unusual; i call it my cardio
question, how many victims those pink shorts got
idk i stop counting after emotional damage 😳
speaking of damage, what’s your go to cereal
just checking what i’m eating after your leg day kills me
ok that line had protein in it
